daily_summary.headline: Starlink Launches and Aurora Alerts Dominate the Day

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-31
top_events.description: A batch of 25 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation - SpaceX's project for space-based Internet communication system.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for best viewing experience.

top_events.title: Aurora Forecast - G1 Storm
top_events.description: Potential aurora visibility due to geomagnetic activity reaching G1 levels.
top_events.action: Check visibility if located above 65° latitude.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 10-48
top_events.description: Another batch of 29 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for best viewing experience.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
